CONTENT.Club career: He made his debut in the Russian Football National League for FC Spartak-2 Moscow on 23 March 2017 in a game against FC Baltika Kaliningrad.He made his debut in the Russian Premier League for FC Spartak Moscow due to the injury of Salvatore Bocchetti on 11 August 2018 as a starter in a game against FC Anzhi Makhachkala.On 1 October 2020, he joined FC Arsenal Tula on loan.On 8 June 2022, Rasskazov extended his contract with Spartak until 2023.On 27 January 2023, Rasskazov signed a 3.5-year contract with PFC Krylia Sovetov Samara.
CONTENT.External links: Nikolai Rasskazov at SoccerwayNikolai Rasskazov at FootballFacts.ru (in Russian)Nikolai Rasskazov at Russian Premier LeagueProfile by Russian Football National League

SUMMARY: Nikolai Olegovich Rasskazov (Russian: Николай Олегович Рассказов; born 4 January 1998) is a Russian football player who plays as a right-back for PFC Krylia Sovetov Samara.
